title: Explicit injury changes bodily condition
syntheticDataDisclosure: Synthetic fixture only; invented prose and records, with no real user or SECRET payload.

acceptedSegment.text: The snapped cable lashed Toma's left palm. Blood welled across the cut, and he could no longer close that hand around the winch handle.
